comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Starting: add python-dotenv support and CLI IP resolution precedence (.env PIXOO_DEVICE_IP, then PIXOO_IP, then default; --ip overrides).

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Updated CLI to load .env via python-dotenv, resolve default IP from PIXOO_DEVICE_IP or PIXOO_IP, and updated README. Added pytest coverage for IP resolution. Pending: decide if any additional docs/tests needed and run tests.
